summary: Completed testing of Discord-style Role Permission System. Backend APIs 100% working (14/14 tests). Frontend Role Editor UI fully functional with all key components verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/permissions/map returns 47 permissions across 8 categories
Backend: @everyone role exists on new servers with default permissions
Backend: VIEW_CHANNELS (bit 1<<1) is ON by default for @everyone
Backend: MANAGE_CHANNELS (bit 1<<2) is OFF by default for @everyone
Backend: POST /api/servers/{id}/roles creates new role
Backend: PUT /api/servers/{id}/roles/{roleId} updates permissions correctly
Backend: Permission toggle persists after save
Backend: DELETE /api/servers/{id}/roles/{roleId} works for custom roles
Backend: DELETE @everyone role returns 400 (cannot delete)
Backend: Permission enforcement on create_channel (requires MANAGE_CHANNELS)
Backend: Permission enforcement on kick_member (requires KICK_MEMBERS)
Backend: Permission enforcement on ban_member (requires BAN_MEMBERS)
Backend: Owner has all permissions (bypasses role checks)
Backend: Large permission bits (up to 2^46) work correctly
Frontend: RoleEditor component loads in Roles tab
Frontend: @everyone role is listed and selected by default
Frontend: 47 permission toggles displayed
Frontend: 8 permission categories displayed (General Server, Membership, Text Channel, Voice Channel, Apps, Stage, Events, Advanced)
Frontend: View Channels toggle is ON by default for @everyone
Frontend: Manage Channels toggle is OFF by default for @everyone
Frontend: Save Changes button works
Frontend: Create Role button and input work
Frontend: Clear permissions button works
Frontend: Delete button hidden for @everyone role
Frontend: Delete button visible for custom roles
Frontend: Permission toggle persists after save and reopen
Frontend: New role appears in role list after creation
seed_data_creation: Created test servers (TEST_RoleServer_*, TestServer_UI, RoleTestServer) during testing - auto-cleaned by test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role Permission System feature is fully functional. Backend has 47 permission bit flags with proper enforcement on key endpoints (create_channel, send_messages, kick, ban). Frontend RoleEditor component in Server Settings > Roles tab works correctly with role list, permission toggles by category, create/delete/save functionality. @everyone role cannot be deleted. Permission changes persist correctly.

features_tested.1_roles_tab_navigation: PASS - Server Settings > Roles tab shows RoleEditor
features_tested.2_everyone_role_default: PASS - @everyone role listed and selected by default
features_tested.3_permission_categories: PASS - 8 categories with toggle switches displayed
features_tested.4_default_permissions: PASS - View Channels ON, Manage Channels OFF by default
features_tested.5_toggle_persistence: PASS - Permission changes persist after save
features_tested.6_create_role: PASS - New role created via input and button
features_tested.7_delete_role: PASS - Custom roles can be deleted
features_tested.8_everyone_no_delete: PASS - @everyone role cannot be deleted (no delete button)
features_tested.9_clear_permissions: PASS - Clear permissions button sets toggles to OFF
features_tested.12_delete_role_api: PASS - DELETE works for custom roles, fails for @everyone
